_comment: Wang Ping is a child. His interactions are social and observational (fishing with Da Niu, gathering firewood, following the player around). Children in this setting do not incur formal favors — their social currency is affection and trust, not obligation. If the player comforts Wang Ping after his dog dies, or helps him with winter prep, a minor favor (owed_to_player) could be CREATED during gameplay via the interaction system. But at chapter start: empty ledger. Wang Ping owes nothing, is owed nothing.

aggregates._comment: Starts at zero. Any favors would be created during gameplay — e.g., if the player helps Wang Ping cope after the dog dies (m_comfort_after_dog_loss), or assists with winter preparations. Child favors are always minor and decay quickly.
